response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, or network security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware — all core requirements. Their background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack development with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of embedded firmware or networking security work.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with well-documented projects
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach via workshops and community contributions
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded environments
Lacks experience with network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.) or switch firmware
No indication of Linux kernel source-level modification or hardware control skills
